{{Quote|The Rebels are rumored to have hidden among the Dantari on Dantooine. Specifically with a tribe called the Janta.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Velso]]|<ref name="SWG:LV">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Lt. Velso"}}</ref>}}
The '''Janta''' were a [[Dantari]] tribe living on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="CDHZ" /> Most of the Janta lived in their [[Dantari Village (Janta)|village]]<ref name="SWG:DV" /> and the tribe also established a [[Janta Stronghold|stronghold]] in a cave.<ref name="SWG:JS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Janta Stronghold|Dantooine}}</ref> The Janta were in conflict with the [[Kunga]] and the [[Mokk]], another Dantari tribes.<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Janta were rumored to allow [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to hide amongst their numbers.<ref name="CDHZ" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a band of Janta attacked an artisan near their cave and stole a couple of his sculptures. The victim later realized that these primitive Janta were not violent but just looking for food.<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|A commoner|Dantooine}}</ref> At some point, a Janta clan leader was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and incarcerated in the [[Dathomir Imperial Prison|Imperial Prison]] on the planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. This clan leader was later killed while trying to escape from the prison.<ref name="SWG:MB">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Mozo Bondog|Dathomir}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Janta appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
